title: Technology Guide
description: Falls prevention technology, digital assessment platforms, EHR integration and data security standards for home care and clinical settings.

blocks.headline: Technology Guide
blocks.subtitle: Digital assessment platforms automate screening, improve data quality and integrate with clinical workflows. Learn how to select and implement falls prevention technology.

blocks.body:
Falls prevention technology automates administration of standardized assessments, captures objective measurements, ensures consistent documentation and provides real-time flagging of high-risk individuals. Digital platforms reduce administrative burden on clinical staff, eliminate transcription errors and generate population-level insights impossible with paper-based workflows. Able Care's assessment platform integrates grip strength testing, functional performance tests and fall risk protocols into existing care delivery processes, in home visits, clinics, residential facilities or remote settings. Modern solutions address critical requirements: seamless EHR integration for clinical workflow compatibility, HIPAA compliance and data security for patient privacy, mobile deployment for dispersed care teams, and automated reporting for regulatory submissions. As falls prevention becomes increasingly central to healthcare quality measurement and reimbursement, technology enables organizations to measure scale that would be impossible with manual processes. This guide covers how assessment platforms work, how to evaluate options for your setting, and how to ensure robust data security and regulatory compliance.

Articles in this guide

  • How Able Assess Works - digital assessment platform features and workflows
  • EHR Integration - connecting assessment data to clinical systems
  • Data Security and HIPAA - protecting patient information and compliance standards
  • Choosing Falls Prevention Software - evaluation criteria and vendor comparison
  • The Future of Falls Prevention - emerging technologies and trends in assessment and monitoring

blocks.heading: Explore falls prevention technology for your organization
blocks.bodyText: Able Care delivers EHR-integrated assessment, real-time risk flagging and automated reporting, all HIPAA compliant and mobile-enabled.
